title: NPI Provider Contact Finder - Input
description: Generate healthcare sales leads with provider contact information. Find doctor emails, practice websites, LinkedIn profiles, and social media from NPPES NPI Registry. Perfect for medical device sales, pharma outreach, healthcare marketing.

mode.sectionDescription: Select what to do: search individual providers, look up by NPI number, search organizations, or search by specialty.
mode.title: 🔍 Scraping mode
mode.description: Select what to do: search providers, get by NPI number, search organizations, or search by specialty.
enumTitles: Bulk Lookup (CSV or JSON list of NPI numbers)

query.sectionDescription: Provide search criteria based on your selected mode.
query.title: 🔎 Search query
query.description: General search term. Used as last name (search_providers), organization name (search_organizations), or specialty (search_by_specialty) depending on mode. For multiple searches in one run, use 'searchQueriesList' instead.

searchQueriesList.title: 🔎 Batch Search Queries
searchQueriesList.description: Run multiple searches in one go. Each item replaces the 'query' field for one search run. Results are automatically deduped by NPI number across all queries. Works with search_providers, search_organizations, and search_by_specialty modes. If provided, takes precedence over the single 'query' field.

npiNumber.title: 🪪 NPI Number
npiNumber.description: 10-digit NPI number for direct lookup (get_provider mode).

npiNumbers.title: 📋 NPI Numbers (bulk)
npiNumbers.description: JSON array of 10-digit NPI numbers for bulk_lookup mode. Example: ["1234567890", "0987654321"]

npiFile.title: 📁 NPI CSV File URL (bulk)
npiFile.description: URL to a CSV file containing NPI numbers for bulk_lookup mode. The file should have a column named 'npi', 'npi_number', or 'NPI', or list one NPI per row. Supports any publicly accessible URL or Apify Key-Value Store URL.

organizationName.title: 🏥 Organization Name
organizationName.description: Organization name (e.g., 'Mayo Clinic', 'Johns Hopkins'). Used in search_organizations mode.

taxonomyDescription.title: 🩺 Specialty / Taxonomy
taxonomyDescription.description: Specialty or taxonomy description (e.g., 'Cardiology', 'Internal Medicine', 'Oncology'). Used in search_by_specialty mode.

maxResults.sectionDescription: Control how many results are returned.
maxResults.title: 📊 Max results
maxResults.description: Maximum number of providers to return (1-1000). Free users are limited to 25 per run.

maxRetries.title: 🔁 Max retries
maxRetries.description: Maximum retry attempts on failed requests.

enableEmailEnrichment.sectionDescription: Enhance provider data with contact information from practice websites and social media. Increases runtime but provides actionable leads.
enableEmailEnrichment.title: 📧 Enable Email Enrichment
enableEmailEnrichment.description: Scrape practice websites for email addresses (office, billing, manager contacts). Adds $0.30/1K contacts to pricing.

enableLinkedInEnrichment.title: 💼 Enable LinkedIn Enrichment
enableLinkedInEnrichment.description: Search for provider LinkedIn profiles. Useful for B2B outreach and relationship building. Adds $0.50/1K contacts to pricing.

enableSocialMediaEnrichment.title: 📱 Enable Social Media Enrichment
enableSocialMediaEnrichment.description: Extract all social media links (Facebook, Twitter, Instagram, Healthgrades, Vitals, Zocdoc). Adds $0.20/1K contacts to pricing.

emailEnrichmentTimeout.title: ⏱️ Email Enrichment Timeout (seconds)
emailEnrichmentTimeout.description: Timeout for scraping each practice website. Lower = faster but may miss emails. Higher = slower but more thorough.
